City Council
3/10/2026 10:00:00 AM


ROLL CALL

LAND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT

PLEDGE OF ALLEGIANCE

REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE BY A COUNCILMEMBER FOR ITEMS SCHEDULED DURING THE MORNING MEETING

PROCLAMATIONS/CEREMONIAL ITEMS

2026 City of San Diego Women of Distinction.
Diversionary Theatre 40th Anniversary Day.
Women’s History Month.
St. Patrick’s Day Parade and Festival Day.
Lowrider Stamp Day.
Jeff Davis Day.
Xochitl Alvarez Day.

CONSENT ITEMS

APPROVAL AGENDA

APPROVAL OF COUNCIL MINUTES

Approval of Council Minutes.

ADOPTION AGENDA

CONSENT, ORDINANCES TO BE INTRODUCED:

Actions Related to the East Village Green Phase 1 Project: Third Amendment to the Compensation Agreement with Civic San Diego and Second Amendment to the Consulting Agreement with Reigelman LLC.

ADOPTION AGENDA

CONSENT, ORDINANCES TO BE ADOPTED:

Request for the Extension of Construction Contract K-21-1870-DBB-3 with Blue Pacific Engineering and Construction for University Avenue Mobility Project.
Request for an Extension of the Construction Contract #K-21-1968-DBB-3 with TC Construction, Inc. for the Construction of Sewer & AC Water Group 763 Project.
Third Amendment to Agreement with Luth and Turley, Inc. for As-Needed Remediation and Clean-up Services from City of San Diego Water Main Breaks and Sewer Backups Pursuant to Council Policy 400-10.
Authorization for the Public Facilities Financing Authority of the City of San Diego Water Revenue Bonds.
Preservation and Progress Package A.

ADOPTION AGENDA

CONSENT, RESOLUTIONS TO BE ADOPTED:

Compensation Agreement – Chinese Historical Museum (404 Third Avenue).
Compensation Agreement – Naval Training Center.
Compensation Agreement – Walker Scott (1014 Fifth Avenue).
Agreements Between the City of San Diego and the San Diego Municipal Employees Association to Amend Articles 21, 47, and 79 of the Memorandum of Understanding Related to Registration, Holiday, and Voluntary Certification Pays for Designated Classifications.
Resolution Authorizing the Marketing Partnership Agreement between the City of San Diego and CPR1, LLC.
Appointment to the Privacy Advisory Board.
Revising the Appointments of Mayor Todd Gloria and Councilmembers to Outside Organizations for Calendar Year 2026.
Declaring a Continued State of Emergency Regarding Raw Sewage, Solid Waste, and Sediment Coming from Tijuana, Mexico.

NON-AGENDA COMMUNICATIONS FROM MAYOR, COUNCIL, INDEPENDENT BUDGET ANALYST, CITY CLERK, CITY ATTORNEY

SPECIAL ORDER OF BUSINESS
